violations.text: Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (sauce) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the hoods have an accumulation of grease and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

The walls in the following areas are constructed of wood. 1. Doorway to basement 2. Wall above prep area 3. Wall in basement - next to window This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

Several foods were observed held at 45-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC foods were put in prep unit one hour prior, all foods were moved to another refrigerator. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

The presence of cockroaches is not controlled as evidenced by live and dead cockroaches throughout establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
Prep unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
Ambient of prep unit was 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was taken out of service, all foods were moved to another refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the hoods have an accumulation of grease and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the steam table have an accumulation of grease, food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
The condensate from the prep unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
At the time of inspection, observed active leak in basement. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the ( ) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

The walls in the following areas are constructed of wood. 1. Doorway to basement 2. Wall above prep unit 3. Wall in basement next to window This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
